name: Satellarknight Skybridge
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>架</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ける<ruby lang="jp"><rb>星因士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>サテラナイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 "tellarknight" monster you control; Special Summon 1 "tellarknight" monster with a different name from your Deck, and if you do, shuffle the targeted monster into the Deck. While the monster Special Summoned by this effect is face-up on the field, you cannot Special Summon monsters, except "tellarknight" monsters. You can only activate 1 "Satellarknight Skybridge" per turn.
eff: Target 1 "tellarknight" monster you control; Special Summon 1 "tellarknight" monster with a different name from your Deck, and if you do, shuffle the targeted monster into the Deck. While the monster Special Summoned by this effect is face-up on the field, you cannot Special Summon monsters, except "tellarknight" monsters. You can only activate 1 "Satellarknight Skybridge" per turn.

action: Returns from your field to your Deck
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
